# PakCric Schedule - LLMs Directory

This file provides information about the PakCric Schedule application for Large Language Models.

## Core Pages
- Home: /
- Cricket Schedule 2026: /schedule
- Team Squads: /squads
- ICC Rankings Overview: /rankings
- T20 Rankings: /icc-t20-ranking-2026
- ODI Rankings: /icc-odi-ranking-2026
- Test Rankings: /icc-test-ranking-2026
- Latest Cricket News: /news
- Expert Blogs: /blogs
- Detailed Player Stats: /players-stats
- WTC Projections: /icc-wtc-projections-2026
- About Us: /about

## Key Features
- Real-time match fixtures and timings in PKT.
- Comprehensive team squads for upcoming series.
- Official ICC rankings for teams and players.
- In-depth match analysis and tactical previews.
- Mobile-optimized performance.

## SEO & Linking
- Optimized SEO structure with 250+ words per key page and proper paragraph segmentation.
- Robust internal linking (8-10 links per page) connecting Schedule, Squads, Rankings, and Blogs.
- Strategic external linking to authoritative resources like PCB, Cricbuzz, and ESPNcricinfo.
- Fixed 404 errors related to missing assets and incorrect internal paths.
